heading: Today
text: Becoming mostly sunny.  Not as warm, and less humid.  Highs in the upper 70s to low 80s north, in the 80s in the Champlain Valley and south.  Light winds becoming west to northwest 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, with some clouds late.  A few showers possible near and north of the Quebec border.  Cooler, and not as muggy.  Lows in the 50s to low 60s.  Winds becoming southwest near 10 mph, becoming light in wind-sheltered valleys.

heading: Sunday
text: Clouds mixed with periods of sun.  A few showers near and north of the Quebec border, with a rising chance of afternoon showers or thunderstorms in NY, spreading east, north of Rt. 4, some with locally heavy rain.  Quite warm.  Highs in the 80s, except upper 70s far north.  Winds southwest, becoming south increasing to 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
